description_long: This house is a large, multi-structure residential property set within a landscaped lot featuring numerous trees and green spaces. The main building has a complex, multi-gabled roof with several intersecting sections, suggesting a sprawling floor plan. The property includes a prominent driveway and paved areas, with a clear front entrance flanked by greenery and a formal approach. The house is surrounded by a mix of manicured lawns, hedges, and mature trees, providing privacy and aesthetic appeal. The exterior appears to be finished in neutral tones, with dark roofing and lighter wall surfaces. A tall, solid fence or wall borders one side of the property, enhancing security and separation from adjacent areas.
description: A large, multi-gabled house with landscaped grounds, mature trees, and a prominent driveway, surrounded by a tall fence on one side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and symmetrical landscaping with trees and hedges.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the property, the tall boundary fence, and the arrangement of green spaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, additional green areas, and the continuation of the fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more trees, the side of the house, and the paved driveway area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of standard and large windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, steps, and flanking columns, set within a landscaped approach.
